title: St. George's Cathedral
tagline: St. George's Cathedral — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: St. George's Cathedral is a much-loved heritage city in Tamil Nadu, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: St. George's Cathedral is a Church of South India (previously Church of England and Anglican) cathedral in Chennai, India. The cathedral was built in 1815. St.

topPlaces.name: Consulate General of the United States, Chennai
topPlaces.description: The Consulate General of the United States of America in Chennai represents the interests of the United States government in Chennai, India and surrounding regions. The consulate reports to the ambassador at the U.S. Embassy in New Delhi.

image.alt: Consulate General of the United States, Chennai

topPlaces.name: Anna Flyover
topPlaces.description: Anna Flyover, also known as Gemini Flyover, is a dual-armed grade separator in the central business district of Chennai, India. Built in 1973, it is the first flyover in Chennai and the third in India.

topPlaces.name: Safire Theatre complex
topPlaces.description: The Safire Theatre complex was India's first largest multi-theatre complex located in the southern city of Chennai that functioned from 1964 to 1994. The theatre complex was located on Mount Road (now Anna Salai) and consisted of three screening halls, namely, Safire, Blue Diamond, and Emerald.

topPlaces.name: Kalaignar Centenary Park
topPlaces.description: Kalaignar Centenary Park is a world class park situated at Gopalapuram neighbourhood in Chennai, Tamil Nadu in India.

topPlaces.name: Semmozhi Poonga
topPlaces.description: Semmozhi Poonga, variously spelled as Semmoli Poonga (literally translated to "Classical Language Park"), is a botanical garden in Chennai set up jointly by the Horticulture and Agricultural Engineering department of the Government of Tamil Nadu. The garden was opened on 24 November 2010 by then chief Minister M. Karunanidhi and is the first botanical garden in the city.

topPlaces.name: Tamil Film Producers Council
topPlaces.description: Tamil Film Producers Council (TFPC), is a union for film producers in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, based in Chennai. Formed on 18 July 1979, the group has a charitable trust fund to provide financial support to retired producers, voiced support for film producers and have collectively protested for socio-political issues.

topPlaces.name: The Park, Chennai
topPlaces.description: The Park Chennai is a five-star deluxe hotel located at the Anna Flyover junction on the erstwhile Gemini Studios premises on Anna Salai, Chennai, India. The hotel, part of the Apeejay Surrendra Group, was opened on 15 May 2002 at an investment of around ₹ 1 billion.

topPlaces.name: Chennai Aero Park
topPlaces.description: Chennai Aero Park is an aerospace industrial park in Chennai, India. The proposal is supported by the Confederation of Indian Industry, and it is estimated that the park will take up 250 acres (1.0 km2) of land.

items.activity: Consulate General of the United States, Chennai
items.note: The Consulate General of the United States of America in Chennai represents the interests of the United States government in Chennai, India and surrounding regions. The consulate reports to the ambassador at the U.S. Embassy in New Delhi.

Anna Flyover, also known as Gemini Flyover, is a dual-armed grade separator in the central business district of Chennai, India. Built in 1973, it is the first flyover in Chennai and the third in India.

The Safire Theatre complex was India's first largest multi-theatre complex located in the southern city of Chennai that functioned from 1964 to 1994. The theatre complex was located on Mount Road (now Anna Salai) and consisted of three screening halls, namely, Safire, Blue Diamond, and Emerald.
Kalaignar Centenary Park is a world class park situated at Gopalapuram neighbourhood in Chennai, Tamil Nadu in India.

Semmozhi Poonga, variously spelled as Semmoli Poonga (literally translated to "Classical Language Park"), is a botanical garden in Chennai set up jointly by the Horticulture and Agricultural Engineering department of the Government of Tamil Nadu. The garden was opened on 24 November 2010 by then chief Minister M. Karunanidhi and is the first botanical garden in the city.

Tamil Film Producers Council (TFPC), is a union for film producers in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, based in Chennai. Formed on 18 July 1979, the group has a charitable trust fund to provide financial support to retired producers, voiced support for film producers and have collectively protested for socio-political issues.

The Park Chennai is a five-star deluxe hotel located at the Anna Flyover junction on the erstwhile Gemini Studios premises on Anna Salai, Chennai, India. The hotel, part of the Apeejay Surrendra Group, was opened on 15 May 2002 at an investment of around ₹ 1 billion.

Chennai Aero Park is an aerospace industrial park in Chennai, India. The proposal is supported by the Confederation of Indian Industry, and it is estimated that the park will take up 250 acres (1.0 km2) of land.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. George's Cathedral?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. George's Cathedral is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. George's Cathedral?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (11 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. George's Cathedral?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. George's Cathedral at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. George's Cathedral?
faq.a: Stays in St. George's Cathedral start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. George's Cathedral?
faq.a: The top attractions are Consulate General of the United States, Chennai, Anna Flyover, Safire Theatre complex, Kalaignar Centenary Park, Semmozhi Poonga.
